user.title: Add a Lithe Audio speaker
user.description: Scan the network for speakers automatically, or enter a speaker's IP address manually.

data.mode: How would you like to find your speaker?

manual.title: Enter speaker details
manual.description: Enter the IP address of the speaker. The model picker determines whether the integration uses TLS (LS10) or plain TCP (LS9).

certificate.title: LS10 client certificate
certificate.description: LS10 speakers ({host}) use TLS 1.2 mutual authentication. Paste the contents of the Lithe-issued client.pem and client.key below. Contact developer@litheaudio.com to obtain these files.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect — check the IP address, port, and (for LS10) that the client certificate is valid.
error.invalid_pem: client.pem doesn't look like a valid PEM certificate.
error.invalid_key: client.key doesn't look like a valid PEM private key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.no_devices_found: No Lithe Audio speakers were found on the network.

play_chime.name: Play chime
play_chime.description: Trigger an embedded audio cue on the speaker.

play_preset.name: Play preset
play_preset.description: Recall a saved favourite by slot number.

save_preset.name: Save preset
save_preset.description: Save the currently playing item into a slot.

play_direct.name: Play direct URL or file
play_direct.description: Play a URL or an on-device file via PLAYITEM.
